steward_foresight: ALIGNED-CONDITIONAL (2026-07-10, obs 817, north-star.md). Both literal walls resolved; TES-06 discharges stage-4's conditional; founding bug caught via ATH-02; guards proportionate. BLOCKING C1 (design-misalignment, scoped): stage-4's defineFactory(fn, {packageDir}) opts into DISK-read schema.json + RBV pre-als.run — 4b models the runner as pure in-memory and is silent: (1) does runFactoryForTest support opted-in factories? (2) ATH-11 zero-fs contradicts the factory-under-test's legitimate schema read — invariant must scope to HARNESS MACHINERY vs factory-under-test; (3) no scenario tests input-validation through the harness. Resolve BEFORE slice (baking pure-in-memory into slices = costly rework). CQ1 production factory.ts importing from a path named /testing until Stage 6 — acceptable 0.x ergonomics? CQ2 (sets C1 scope) should authors test input-validation through the harness? CQ3 shipping the fake in-tarball behind 6 guards vs separate @pbuilder/testing package. Conscience suspicion: without C1, green harness for bare bodies while typed/validated factories stay awkward — outputs-without-full-outcome. OWNER ANSWERS 2026-07-10: CQ2 YES support opted-in factories (harness runs them as-is — packageDir lives in the definition; ATH-11 re-scoped to harness machinery, factory-under-test may read ITS schema; RBV rejection surfaces as result.error; +1-2 scenarios; V3 MICRO-UNFREEZE AUTHORIZED by this selection, re-signed on it). CQ1 acceptable 0.x interim (ADR-0032 + README declare defineFactory lives in ./testing until Stage 6). CQ3 proportionate now (separate @pbuilder/testing rejected; follow-up registered to re-evaluate extraction alongside kit at Stage 6). GATE PASSED conditional on C1 landing in V3 + design rev 3 before slice.
